results.title: Wisconsin announces UW Athletic Hall of Fame Class of 2026
results.description: MADISON — University of Wisconsin Interim Director of Athletics Marcus Sedberry announced on Thursday that a class of 12 student-athletes, staff and supporters of Wisconsin Athletics will be inducted into the UW Athletic Hall of Fame as members of the...

results.title: Canadiens have tall task ahead; Canes aim to close out series in Game 5
results.description: The Montreal Canadiens have twice already in these playoffs drummed up a victory in an elimination game. The Canadiens must find that magic again to keep their playoff hopes alive when they visit the Carolina Hurricanes on Friday for Game 5 of the Eastern Conference finals in Raleigh, N.C.

results.title: Pride Round begins on Eaglehawk’s ground
results.description: PRIDE Round across the Champions IGA-backed CVFL senior women’s footy competition kicks off with Friday night’s match at C & M Oval in Eaglehawk’s Canterbury... Read More » The post Pride Round begins on Eaglehawk’s ground appeared first on AFL Central Victoria .

results.title: Glen Rose softball player battling cancer gifted WCWS trip by ESPN reporter Holly Rowe
